# Prime Invoice Protocol

> DeFi Invoice Factoring Protocol on Base (L2). Tokenizing corporate invoices for SME liquidity.

## Core Logic & Math

### Fee Structure (Total 10%)
- **30-Day Term**: 200 BPS Protocol / 800 BPS Financier Yield.
- **60-Day Term**: 150 BPS Protocol / 850 BPS Financier Yield.
- **90-Day Term**: 100 BPS Protocol / 900 BPS Financier Yield.

### Workflow
1. `proposeInvoice`: SME Supplier -> Buyer (Proposed)
2. `approveInvoice`: Buyer -> Blockchain (Approved)
3. `factorInvoice`: Financier -> Supplier (Factored)
4. `repayInvoice`: Buyer -> Financier (Repaid)

## API Reference (Solidity)

### Write Functions
- `proposeInvoice(address _buyer, uint256 _amount, uint256 _dueDate, uint256 _termDays)`
- `approveInvoice(uint256 _invoiceId)`
- `factorInvoice(uint256 _invoiceId)`
- `repayInvoice(uint256 _invoiceId)`
- `verifyBuyer(address _buyer, bool _status)` (Admin Only)
- `verifySupplier(address _supplier, bool _status)` (Admin Only)

### Read Functions
- `invoices(uint256 id)` -> Invoice Struct
- `calculateFees(uint256 _amount, uint256 _termDays)` -> (protocolFee, financierYield, totalFee, supplierPayout)
- `verifiedBuyers(address)` -> bool
- `verifiedSuppliers(address)` -> bool

## RWA & Legal Compliance
- **Asset Link**: Each invoice maps to an off-chain legal claim.
- **Dispute Resolution**: On-chain status (`Factored`, `Repaid`) serves as evidence for off-chain legal enforcement.
- **Clawback**: Protocol owner/admin manages legal attestations stored in IPFS/on-chain metadata.

## Guides

- [Architecture](https://github.com/Nolas-Shadow/prime-invoice/blob/main/AGENTS.md)
